mapper.select:
SELECT ta.scId AS scid, ta.sid AS sid, ta.sNo AS sno, ta.sName AS sname, ta.sSex AS ssex, ta.sClassId AS sclassid, ta.className AS classname, ta.classCode AS classcode, ta.yYear AS yyear, ta.yTerm AS yterm, ta.yAll AS yall, ta.scCourseId AS sccourseid, ta.crCode AS crcode, ta.crName AS crname, ta.scScore AS scscore, ta.scStatus AS scstatus, DATE_FORMAT(ta.scCreateDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS screatedate FROM vwscores ta
ORDER BY ta.scId DESC LIMIT #{dto.pageStart}, #{dto.pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(ta.scScore), 2), 0) AS avgScore, IFNULL(MAX(ta.scScore), 0) AS maxScore, IFNULL(MIN(ta.scScore), 0) AS minScore, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ta.scScore >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(1), 2), 0) AS passRate, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ta.scScore >= 85 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(1), 2), 0) AS goodRate FROM vwscores ta

SELECT '不及格' AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM vwscores ta
AND ta.scScore < 60
UNION ALL
SELECT '60-69' AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM vwscores ta
AND ta.scScore >= 60 AND ta.scScore < 70
UNION ALL
SELECT '70-79' AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM vwscores ta
AND ta.scScore >= 70 AND ta.scScore < 80
UNION ALL
SELECT '80-89' AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM vwscores ta
AND ta.scScore >= 80 AND ta.scScore < 90
UNION ALL
SELECT '90-100' AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM vwscores ta
AND ta.scScore >= 90

SELECT ta.className AS name, ROUND(AVG(ta.scScore), 2) AS value FROM vwscores ta
GROUP BY ta.sClassId, ta.className ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT ta.yAll AS name, ROUND(AVG(ta.scScore), 2) AS value FROM vwscores ta
GROUP BY ta.scTermId, ta.yAll ORDER BY ta.scTermId ASC

SELECT DISTINCT yt.yId AS yid, yt.yYear AS yyear, yt.yTerm AS yterm, yt.yAll AS yall FROM teaching t LEFT JOIN yearterm yt ON t.tcTermId = yt.yId WHERE t.tcTeacherId = #{teacherId} ORDER BY yt.yId ASC
SELECT DISTINCT c.cId AS cid, c.cName AS cname, c.cCode AS ccode FROM teaching t LEFT JOIN classinfo c ON t.tcClassId = c.cId WHERE t.tcTeacherId = #{teacherId} ORDER BY c.cId ASC
SELECT DISTINCT c.crId AS crid, c.crCode AS crcode, c.crName AS crname FROM teaching t LEFT JOIN courseinfo c ON t.tcCourseId = c.crId WHERE t.tcTeacherId = #{teacherId} ORDER BY c.crId ASC
